sentences.arabic: أَعْتَقِدُ أَنَّ الصُّورَةَ الطَّيِّبَةَ عَنِ النَّفْسِ تُسَاعِدُنَا.
sentences.translation: Smatram da dobra slika o sebi nam pomaže.
sentences.translationEn: I believe that a good image of oneself helps us.

sentences.arabic: حِينَ تُؤْمِنُ بِنَفْسِكَ تَجِدُ قُوَّةً لِتُحَاوِلَ.
sentences.translation: Kada vjeruješ u sebe, pronalziš snagu da probaš.
sentences.translationEn: When you believe in yourself you find strength to try.

sentences.arabic: لَا يَجِبُ أَنْ تُقَارِنَ نَفْسَكَ بِالْآخَرِينَ دَائِمًا.
sentences.translation: Ne smiješ uvijek porediti sebe s drugima.
sentences.translationEn: You should not always compare yourself to others.

sentences.arabic: كُلُّ شَخْصٍ لَهُ مَوَاهِبُهُ وَقُدُرَاتُهُ الْخَاصَّةُ.
sentences.translation: Svaka osoba ima svoje talente i sposobnosti.
sentences.translationEn: Every person has their own talents and abilities.
